source.method: concept views from formula dependencies, formula-symbol maps, and structured evidence

views.name: Theta
views.definition: Ij theta = 4N e u pi $ in the literature.
views.definition_zh: Theta 是这条公式要读出的核心量；等号右侧说明它由哪些条件和符号共同决定。
views.formula_section: RELATIVE POWER OF MUTATION AND GENETIC DRIFT

introduced_concepts.name: Expected Heterozygosity
introduced_concepts.definition: The expected level of genetic diversity, often measured by nucleotide diversity.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 期望杂合度表示模型预期的遗传多样性水平，在这里用核苷酸多样性来衡量。

introduced_concepts.name: Likelihood
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of how well a model explains observed data.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量模型解释观测数据程度的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 4.1 Index
introduced_concepts.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 4.1 Count
introduced_concepts.definition: A discrete number of items, individuals, or events.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 对个体、事件或类别数量的离散计数。

views.name: Variance
views.definition: A measure of spread around the mean.
views.definition_zh: 衡量一个量围绕平均值分散程度的指标。
